_comment: Host x86 ground station — two RTL88x2 USB adapters, both on channel 149.

up: nmcli device set wlx40a5ef2f229b managed no
iw dev wlx40a5ef2f229b set monitor otherbss
nmcli device set wlx40a5ef2f2308 managed no
iw dev wlx40a5ef2f2308 set monitor otherbss
down: nmcli device set wlx40a5ef2f229b managed yes
nmcli device set wlx40a5ef2f2308 managed yes

tunnels._comment: Diversity RX. udp_out omitted -> wfb_rx default 127.0.0.1:5600. Stats forwarded to uplink TX UDP-in for back-channel.
tunnels.name: video

tunnels._comment: Uplink TX. -T 1 sets fec_timeout=1ms. control_port=8000 enables wfb_cmd passthrough via /api/v1/tunnels/uplink/control.
tunnels.name: uplink
